steps.title: Identify what 'featured' describes in this context
steps.content: The photograph contains a portrait of Great-Great-Grandmother Rosita. The word “featured” describes what the photo shows or displays.

steps.title: Match the target meaning
steps.content:
The target meaning is “displayed” or “showed” — what a photograph presents visually.

Choice D) “displayed” directly matches this. The other choices fail to fit: “ignored” contradicts the act of showing something, while “approved” and “questioned” describe evaluative judgments, not visual display.

That matches choice D — D is correct.
